title: eriobotrya japonica
intro: Eriobotrya japonica, also known as the loquat tree, is a deciduous evergreen tree that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The loquat tree has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The loquat tree has been found to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and supporting digestive health. The loquat tree can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being.
